prestazioni: Engine swap to a **EN07X** (Supercharged 658cc DOHC 16V) with a **HKS GT-SS Supercharger Kit** (8 psi boost, 120+ hp) paired with a **TODA Racing EN07 forged piston set** (12.5:1 compression) and **Tomei EN07 billet crankshaft** for high-RPM stability (9,000 RPM redline).

Full **Spoon Sports EN07X** valvetrain upgrade: **Spoon Sports titanium retainers**, **Tomei EN07 Type-R camshafts** (272° duration, 10.5mm lift), and **Jun EN07 valve springs** (100 lbs/in) for aggressive cam profiles without valve float.

Forced induction: **Garrett GT12 turbocharger** (custom-machined **SARD EN07 turbo manifold**) with a **GReddy Type-S intercooler** (front-mount, 100% aluminum core) and **HKS SSQV BOV** (adjustable dual-chamber) to eliminate turbo lag in the 3,000-7,000 RPM range.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB Works Pleo RS** widebody kit (FRP construction, +80mm front/+100mm rear fender flares) with **Volk Racing TE37SL 13x4.5" wheels** (ET+38, 155/60R13 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires) for aggressive stance.

**C-West Pleo RS** front bumper lip (carbon fiber, JDM-spec) with **Seibon Carbon Pleo RS** hood (vented, 1.5kg weight reduction) and **RE Amemiya Pleo RS** rear diffuser (polyurethane, 3-piece bolt-on).

**Sparco Chrono Pleo RS** digital dash overlay (CAN-bus integration, 12,000 RPM shift light, boost/vacuum gauge) paired with a **Bride GIAS II** racing seat (fixed-back, 6-point harness compatibility) and **NRG Innovations** quick-release steering wheel hub.
